title: Leave My Hotbar Alone!
description: Reverts the hotbar textures from any GUI modification resourcepacks. - Compatibility with Axiom mod, too!
body:
**Note: This resourcepack must be used with a GUI modifier resourcepack to have an effect.**
# ⚡ Functionality #
1. **Reverts the hotbar texture and all the related heart, hunger, etc. textures** to Mojang's default. (Including any modifications to the Axiom mod's hotbar menus to their own defaults.)
_It's good to use this resourcepack when the GUI modifier resourcepack doesn't have a ResPackOpts configuration option. It's somewhat like a force replace for the hotbars._

# ➕ Dependecies #
**Any GUI modifier resourcepacks that modifies the hotbar.** It's intended to be used with [Recolourful Containers](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/recolourful-containers-gui) resourcepack.

# ❔ How to use #
Install the resourcepack and **remember to put it above any GUI modifier resourcepacks**.

# ❗ Report Issues #
**Any issues with this project can be reported in our [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/5PCXmRYcJc).**

# 📢 Intended Use #
This resourcepack is featured on the some versions of **Ultimately Optimized** modpack. (Which is my own modpack!)

> **[Check Out "Ultimately Optimized"](https://modrinth.com/modpack/minecraft-ultimately-optimized)**

# 🪙 Credit #
None of the textures in this resourcepack, besides its icon, are made by me. Those assets were extracted from [Axiom mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/axiom/)'s Jar file. Also Minecraft textures are downloaded from MC Assets. Credits to their respective owners.

# 🎫 Licencing #
> This modpack is licensed under **Creative Commons Attribution Non Commercial No Derivatives 4.0 International**. A summary of it means that you, as a user of this project, can **redistributable my project as long as it isn't modified, it isn't for commercial use, and you credit me and my project** You shall also credit the respective owners of the textures in this resourcepack, as those are not made by me.
